content.text:
The file /workspace/YatCC/AGENTS.md has been edited. Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of /workspace/YatCC/AGENTS.md:
    32	- Score breakdown (per case): 60% token kind+value, 30% Loc, 10% middle markers (`[StartOfLine]`/`[LeadingSpace]`).
    33	- Reference answer at `build/test/task1/<case>/answer.txt`; produced by `task1-answer` target (depends on `task0-answer`).
    34	
    35	## Task 3 ÔÇö DONE (100/100, 72/72 cases)
    36	- Stack: `TASK3_REVIVE=ON` Ôćĺ input is task2's `answer.json` (clang's full AST), output is `.ll` IR.
    37	- Scoring: only stdout + return code must match `clang -O0 ...; ./a.out`. **No textual IR comparison** ÔÇö semantically-equivalent IR is accepted.
    38	- Files modified: `task/3/EmitIR.{hpp,cpp}` (rewritten); other framework files (`Json2Asg`, `asg`, `Obj`, `main`) untouched.
    39	- Key design choices:
    40	  - `Decl::any` stores the LLVM `Value*` (alloca for locals, `GlobalVariable*` for globals, `Function*` for funcs).
    41	  - `operator()(Expr*)` returns the **natural** LLVM value: lvalue Ôćĺ ptr (address), rvalue Ôćĺ value. Loads happen at `ImplicitCastExpr(LValueToRValue)`.
    42	  - LLVM 17 opaque pointers ÔÇö every pointer is `ptr`. `CreateLoad(ty, ptr)` and `CreateInBoundsGEP(elemTy, ptr, indices)` need explicit element types, computed from the lhs's `lftType->texp` (`PointerType::sub` after `ArrayToPointerDecay`, or `ArrayType::sub`).
    43	  - Short-circuit `&&` / `||`: explicit basic blocks + PHI of i1, then `zext i1 Ôćĺ i32` for the result.
    44	  - Control flow stmts: `if/else`, `while`, `do`, `break`, `continue` track `(breakBb, continueBb)` on `mLoopStack`. After every `return/break/continue` we open an "after" dead block so subsequent code in the AST has a valid insert point.
    45	  - Initialization:
    46	    - Global: `emit_const(ty, init)` recursively builds `llvm::Constant` (handles `InitListExpr` nested + missing Ôćĺ null).
    47	    - Local arrays: `emit_init` does `memset(0)` then stores non-zero elements via GEP (handles nested `int a[4][2]` etc.). `ImplicitInitExpr` Ôçĺ memset only.
    48	    - Local scalars: alloca + store init.
    49	  - Function params: emit alloca per param, store the incoming `&arg` into it (matches O0 convention; lets `&arg` be taken later if needed). Array/pointer params get `ptr` alloca.
    50	  - Function calls: walk through `ImplicitCastExpr` chain to find original `DeclRefExpr` for the function type, then `CreateCall(fty, fnPtr, args)`.
    51	  - `Json2Asg` only handles cast kinds `LValueToRValue`/`ArrayToPointerDecay`/`FunctionToPointerDecay` ÔÇö no `IntegralCast` ever appears for these test inputs (we still handle it defensively).
    52	- Pitfall: `llvm::ConstantExpr::getIntegerCast` was removed in LLVM 17. Use `ConstantInt::get(llty, ci->getSExtValue())` for compile-time integral casts.
    53	- Pitfall: After emitting a return/break/continue, the IR builder's insert point would still be the same terminated block; subsequent stmts would crash. Solution: always create a fresh "dead" block and reset insert point.
    54	
    55	## Task 2 ÔÇö DONE (100/100, 72/72 cases)
    56	- Stack: `antlr` (`TASK2_WITH=antlr`, `TASK2_REVIVE=ON`, so input is Task 1's clang-style token dump).
    57	- Files modified:
    58	  - `task/2/antlr/SYsULexer.tokens` ÔÇö added IDs for `Const Void If Else While Break Continue Star Slash Percent EqualEqual ExclaimEqual Less LessEqual Greater GreaterEqual Exclaim AmpAmp PipePipe`.
    59	  - `task/2/antlr/SYsULexer.cpp` ÔÇö extended `kClangTokens` map (clang token name Ôćĺ numeric token id).
    60	
Review the changes and make sure they are as expected. Edit the file again if necessary.

observation.old_content:
# YatCC Repository ÔÇö Agent Notes

## Repo Layout
- Working dir: `/workspace/YatCC` (equiv. to `/YatCC`).
- Tasks live in `task/<n>/`. Tests + scoring in `test/<n>/`.
- Build dir: `build/`. Scoring outputs at `build/test/task<n>/score.txt` and `score.json`.
- Toolchain: clang/LLVM at `/workspace/YatCC/llvm/install`, antlr at `/workspace/YatCC/antlr`.

## Forbidden
- Do NOT modify anything in `/workspace/YatCC/test/` except `test/diy-cases/`.

## Common Commands
- Build a task: `cmake --build build -t task<n>`
- Score a task: `cmake --build build -t task<n>-score`
- View score: `cat build/test/task<n>/score.txt`
- Force rebuild: `rm -rf build && cmake -S . -B build && cmake --build build -t task<n>`

## Task 0 ÔÇö DONE (100/100)
- Just had to make `task/0/main.cpp` exit normally. Wrote a minimal `std::cout << "Hello, YatCC!"` and `return 0;`.
- Scoring: program exit code 0 Ôçĺ 100. (`test/task0/score.py`)

## Task 1 ÔÇö DONE (100/100, 72/72 cases)
- Stack: `antlr` (set in `config.cmake`'s `TASK1_WITH`).
- Files modified:
  - `task/1/antlr/SYsULexer.g4`: full token set (const/int/void/return/if/else/while/break/continue, all punctuation, `==`/`!=`/`<=`/`>=`/`&&`/`||` BEFORE the single-char variants so they win, decimal/octal/hex `Constant`). Whitespace/Newline/`#`-markers go to `channel(HIDDEN)` (NOT `skip`), so we can still query them ÔÇö but actually we ignored them and computed [StartOfLine]/[LeadingSpace] from the source text directly.
  - `task/1/antlr/main.cpp`: read input fully, build `phys_line -> (real_file, real_line)` table from cpp line markers (`# linenum "file" flags*`), then for each token output `kind 'text'\t [StartOfLine]\t [LeadingSpace]\tLoc=<file:line:col>` where:
    - `col = token->getCharPositionInLine() + 1`
    - `[StartOfLine]` set on first emitted token per physical line
    - `[LeadingSpace]` set when prev char on the same line is `' '` or `'\t'`
    - EOF emitted at (lastFile, lastLine, lastCol+lastLen) ÔÇö i.e. one past end of last real token
- Output format pitfall: always emit two `\t` (one after `'text'`, one before `Loc=`) regardless of whether flags appear, otherwise the answer compare fails.
- Score breakdown (per case): 60% token kind+value, 30% Loc, 10% middle markers (`[StartOfLine]`/`[LeadingSpace]`).
- Reference answer at `build/test/task1/<case>/answer.txt`; produced by `task1-answer` target (depends on `task0-answer`).

## Task 2 ÔÇö DONE (100/100, 72/72 cases)
- Stack: `antlr` (`TASK2_WITH=antlr`, `TASK2_REVIVE=ON`, so input is Task 1's clang-style token dump).
- Files modified:
  - `task/2/antlr/SYsULexer.tokens` ÔÇö added IDs for `Const Void If Else While Break Continue Star Slash Percent EqualEqual ExclaimEqual Less LessEqual Greater GreaterEqual Exclaim AmpAmp PipePipe`.
  - `task/2/antlr/SYsULexer.cpp` ÔÇö extended `kClangTokens` map (clang token name Ôćĺ numeric token id).
  - `task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4` ÔÇö full SYsU grammar:
    - primary `Identifier`, `Constant`, `( expression )`
    - postfix: array `[ expression ]`, call `( argumentExpressionList? )` (left-assoc)
    - unary `+ - !` (recursive)
    - precedence ladder: `* / %`, `+ -`, `< <= > >=`, `== !=`, `&&`, `||`
    - assignment is right-recursive (`unary = assignment`)
    - declarations: `typeSpecifier` (Int|Void), `typeQualifier` (Const), function declarators with `parameterTypeList` (named or abstract; arrays in abstract decl).
    - statements: `if/else`, `while`, `break`, `continue`, `return`.
    - `functionDefinition: declarationSpecifiers directDeclarator compoundStatement` ÔÇö declarator-based so we share parameter parsing with declarations.
  - `task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.hpp/.cpp` ÔÇö rewrote `Ast2Asg` to walk the new grammar:
    - `DeclarationSpecifiers`: handles Int/Void plus `Const` qualifier.
    - `DirectDeclarator`: also handles `LeftParen parameterTypeList? RightParen` Ôćĺ builds `FunctionType` with `params` (loses param names; backfilled later).
    - `PostfixExpression`: iterates children, emits `BinaryExpr(kIndex)` for `[]` and `CallExpr` for `()`.
    - All precedence-level expression rules walk `children`, dispatching on token type.
    - `UnaryExpression`: supports `+`, `-`, `!`.
    - `PrimaryExpression`: also wraps `( expression )` as `ParenExpr`.
    - `SelectionStatement` / `IterationStatement` Ôćĺ `IfStmt` / `WhileStmt`.
    - `JumpStatement`: `return`, `break`, `continue`.
    - `FunctionDefinition` and the function-decl branch of `InitDeclarator` re-walk `parameterTypeList` to fill `params[i]->name` (since `FunctionType` only carries types).
- Pitfall: param names ÔÇö initial pass missed forward function declarations (sylib.h prototypes), so ParmVarDecl had empty `name` and the comparator dropped ~3 points per file. Fix is to backfill names by re-walking `parameterDeclaration` list in `InitDeclarator` for the FunctionType branch.
- `Typing.cpp` & `Asg2Json.cpp` are framework-provided and already handle every node kind we generate; no changes needed.

## General Patterns Observed
- `score.py` produces `score.txt` (human) and `score.json` (autograder) under `build/test/task<n>/`.
- Per-case answer files live under `build/test/task<n>/<case>/answer.*` (e.g. `answer.txt`, `answer.json`, `answer.ll`).
- `cases.txt` lists official test cases.
observation.new_content:
# YatCC Repository ÔÇö Agent Notes

## Repo Layout
- Working dir: `/workspace/YatCC` (equiv. to `/YatCC`).
- Tasks live in `task/<n>/`. Tests + scoring in `test/<n>/`.
- Build dir: `build/`. Scoring outputs at `build/test/task<n>/score.txt` and `score.json`.
- Toolchain: clang/LLVM at `/workspace/YatCC/llvm/install`, antlr at `/workspace/YatCC/antlr`.

## Forbidden
- Do NOT modify anything in `/workspace/YatCC/test/` except `test/diy-cases/`.

## Common Commands
- Build a task: `cmake --build build -t task<n>`
- Score a task: `cmake --build build -t task<n>-score`
- View score: `cat build/test/task<n>/score.txt`
- Force rebuild: `rm -rf build && cmake -S . -B build && cmake --build build -t task<n>`

## Task 0 ÔÇö DONE (100/100)
- Just had to make `task/0/main.cpp` exit normally. Wrote a minimal `std::cout << "Hello, YatCC!"` and `return 0;`.
- Scoring: program exit code 0 Ôçĺ 100. (`test/task0/score.py`)

## Task 1 ÔÇö DONE (100/100, 72/72 cases)
- Stack: `antlr` (set in `config.cmake`'s `TASK1_WITH`).
- Files modified:
  - `task/1/antlr/SYsULexer.g4`: full token set (const/int/void/return/if/else/while/break/continue, all punctuation, `==`/`!=`/`<=`/`>=`/`&&`/`||` BEFORE the single-char variants so they win, decimal/octal/hex `Constant`). Whitespace/Newline/`#`-markers go to `channel(HIDDEN)` (NOT `skip`), so we can still query them ÔÇö but actually we ignored them and computed [StartOfLine]/[LeadingSpace] from the source text directly.
  - `task/1/antlr/main.cpp`: read input fully, build `phys_line -> (real_file, real_line)` table from cpp line markers (`# linenum "file" flags*`), then for each token output `kind 'text'\t [StartOfLine]\t [LeadingSpace]\tLoc=<file:line:col>` where:
    - `col = token->getCharPositionInLine() + 1`
    - `[StartOfLine]` set on first emitted token per physical line
    - `[LeadingSpace]` set when prev char on the same line is `' '` or `'\t'`
    - EOF emitted at (lastFile, lastLine, lastCol+lastLen) ÔÇö i.e. one past end of last real token
- Output format pitfall: always emit two `\t` (one after `'text'`, one before `Loc=`) regardless of whether flags appear, otherwise the answer compare fails.
- Score breakdown (per case): 60% token kind+value, 30% Loc, 10% middle markers (`[StartOfLine]`/`[LeadingSpace]`).
- Reference answer at `build/test/task1/<case>/answer.txt`; produced by `task1-answer` target (depends on `task0-answer`).

## Task 3 ÔÇö DONE (100/100, 72/72 cases)
- Stack: `TASK3_REVIVE=ON` Ôćĺ input is task2's `answer.json` (clang's full AST), output is `.ll` IR.
- Scoring: only stdout + return code must match `clang -O0 ...; ./a.out`. **No textual IR comparison** ÔÇö semantically-equivalent IR is accepted.
- Files modified: `task/3/EmitIR.{hpp,cpp}` (rewritten); other framework files (`Json2Asg`, `asg`, `Obj`, `main`) untouched.
- Key design choices:
  - `Decl::any` stores the LLVM `Value*` (alloca for locals, `GlobalVariable*` for globals, `Function*` for funcs).
  - `operator()(Expr*)` returns the **natural** LLVM value: lvalue Ôćĺ ptr (address), rvalue Ôćĺ value. Loads happen at `ImplicitCastExpr(LValueToRValue)`.
  - LLVM 17 opaque pointers ÔÇö every pointer is `ptr`. `CreateLoad(ty, ptr)` and `CreateInBoundsGEP(elemTy, ptr, indices)` need explicit element types, computed from the lhs's `lftType->texp` (`PointerType::sub` after `ArrayToPointerDecay`, or `ArrayType::sub`).
  - Short-circuit `&&` / `||`: explicit basic blocks + PHI of i1, then `zext i1 Ôćĺ i32` for the result.
  - Control flow stmts: `if/else`, `while`, `do`, `break`, `continue` track `(breakBb, continueBb)` on `mLoopStack`. After every `return/break/continue` we open an "after" dead block so subsequent code in the AST has a valid insert point.
  - Initialization:
    - Global: `emit_const(ty, init)` recursively builds `llvm::Constant` (handles `InitListExpr` nested + missing Ôćĺ null).
    - Local arrays: `emit_init` does `memset(0)` then stores non-zero elements via GEP (handles nested `int a[4][2]` etc.). `ImplicitInitExpr` Ôçĺ memset only.
    - Local scalars: alloca + store init.
  - Function params: emit alloca per param, store the incoming `&arg` into it (matches O0 convention; lets `&arg` be taken later if needed). Array/pointer params get `ptr` alloca.
  - Function calls: walk through `ImplicitCastExpr` chain to find original `DeclRefExpr` for the function type, then `CreateCall(fty, fnPtr, args)`.
  - `Json2Asg` only handles cast kinds `LValueToRValue`/`ArrayToPointerDecay`/`FunctionToPointerDecay` ÔÇö no `IntegralCast` ever appears for these test inputs (we still handle it defensively).
- Pitfall: `llvm::ConstantExpr::getIntegerCast` was removed in LLVM 17. Use `ConstantInt::get(llty, ci->getSExtValue())` for compile-time integral casts.
- Pitfall: After emitting a return/break/continue, the IR builder's insert point would still be the same terminated block; subsequent stmts would crash. Solution: always create a fresh "dead" block and reset insert point.

## Task 2 ÔÇö DONE (100/100, 72/72 cases)
- Stack: `antlr` (`TASK2_WITH=antlr`, `TASK2_REVIVE=ON`, so input is Task 1's clang-style token dump).
- Files modified:
  - `task/2/antlr/SYsULexer.tokens` ÔÇö added IDs for `Const Void If Else While Break Continue Star Slash Percent EqualEqual ExclaimEqual Less LessEqual Greater GreaterEqual Exclaim AmpAmp PipePipe`.
  - `task/2/antlr/SYsULexer.cpp` ÔÇö extended `kClangTokens` map (clang token name Ôćĺ numeric token id).
  - `task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4` ÔÇö full SYsU grammar:
    - primary `Identifier`, `Constant`, `( expression )`
    - postfix: array `[ expression ]`, call `( argumentExpressionList? )` (left-assoc)
    - unary `+ - !` (recursive)
    - precedence ladder: `* / %`, `+ -`, `< <= > >=`, `== !=`, `&&`, `||`
    - assignment is right-recursive (`unary = assignment`)
    - declarations: `typeSpecifier` (Int|Void), `typeQualifier` (Const), function declarators with `parameterTypeList` (named or abstract; arrays in abstract decl).
    - statements: `if/else`, `while`, `break`, `continue`, `return`.
    - `functionDefinition: declarationSpecifiers directDeclarator compoundStatement` ÔÇö declarator-based so we share parameter parsing with declarations.
  - `task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.hpp/.cpp` ÔÇö rewrote `Ast2Asg` to walk the new grammar:
    - `DeclarationSpecifiers`: handles Int/Void plus `Const` qualifier.
    - `DirectDeclarator`: also handles `LeftParen parameterTypeList? RightParen` Ôćĺ builds `FunctionType` with `params` (loses param names; backfilled later).
    - `PostfixExpression`: iterates children, emits `BinaryExpr(kIndex)` for `[]` and `CallExpr` for `()`.
    - All precedence-level expression rules walk `children`, dispatching on token type.
    - `UnaryExpression`: supports `+`, `-`, `!`.
    - `PrimaryExpression`: also wraps `( expression )` as `ParenExpr`.
    - `SelectionStatement` / `IterationStatement` Ôćĺ `IfStmt` / `WhileStmt`.
    - `JumpStatement`: `return`, `break`, `continue`.
    - `FunctionDefinition` and the function-decl branch of `InitDeclarator` re-walk `parameterTypeList` to fill `params[i]->name` (since `FunctionType` only carries types).
- Pitfall: param names ÔÇö initial pass missed forward function declarations (sylib.h prototypes), so ParmVarDecl had empty `name` and the comparator dropped ~3 points per file. Fix is to backfill names by re-walking `parameterDeclaration` list in `InitDeclarator` for the FunctionType branch.
- `Typing.cpp` & `Asg2Json.cpp` are framework-provided and already handle every node kind we generate; no changes needed.

## General Patterns Observed
- `score.py` produces `score.txt` (human) and `score.json` (autograder) under `build/test/task<n>/`.
- Per-case answer files live under `build/test/task<n>/<case>/answer.*` (e.g. `answer.txt`, `answer.json`, `answer.ll`).
- `cases.txt` lists official test cases.
